name: Blueberry Oatmeal Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the dry ingredients into the bread machine basket, except for the blueberries.
3. Add the water or drained juice so that the total volume is 1-1/2 cups.
4. Set the baking control to medium and select white bread setting.
5. Start the bread machine.
6. Tested in DAK with a 1-1/2 lb R2D2 bread machine.
7. Sylvia's comment: Source: Loafing It. MM by Sylvia Steiger, GEnie THE.STEIGERS, CI$ 71511,2253, GT Cookbook echo moderator at net/node 004/005.
